systems.name: Grafcet Renderer
systems.description: Pure-Python module turning grafcet step JSON into SVG diagrams

containers.name: Renderer Pipeline
containers.description: Six-layer L1..L6 pipeline producing SVG and trace events

components.name: L1 Layout
components.description: Step boxes, branch anchors, gates, direction-aware ports, simplification

components.name: L3 Routing
components.description: route_from_anchor dispatcher, left-bus / right-bus selection, channel slot bumping

components.name: L5 Compaction
components.description: Y compaction + cross-row super-grouping + no-revert rule

components.name: L6 SVG Emit
components.description: Label placement, dot/bar render, OR/AND distinction, debug.log
